_doc.now: Treat THIS as the current moment. Do not read the machine clock anywhere in your engine — reason from this value so results are reproducible and tests deterministic.
_doc.deliveryDate: The festival. Goats are fulfilled for customers on this date. It does not move.
_doc.note: The relationship between 'now' and 'deliveryDate' is the heart of the assignment. Read the founder's brief before deciding what each rule is evaluated against.
